title: Allow dns settings with --net=host
body:
This seems to be a needless restriction.  We make a copy of the
hosts /etc/resolv.conf file, so these changes to not modify the
host.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

Well since you chunked it in with https://github.com/containers/libpod/commit/bb6c1cf8d1667c7c8e4d539ea2250a18fa89a58a#diff-5c477d25a05f2b2febdfaaa6fd00df78, then if you think it's no longer needed, then LGTM.
